prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为10504→6116→10442→11329→7839，整体波动较大，近5年呈现"大起大落"特征；2025年基准位次约7839名，较2024年明显前移（竞争加剧），反映出该校在内蒙古理科考生中的报考热度有所回升；该校在内蒙古理科/物理类招生计划2021年100人、2022–2025年均为98人，2026年增至102人，小幅扩招约4.1%，扩招通常使竞争略有缓和，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第38名（2026年），层次较高，对高分考生有较强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区认知争议，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第82位（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注度异常信号；依托东北大学本部学科实力，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-等，与该校在内蒙古招生的自动化类、计算机类、机械类、材料类等专业高度对应，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在内蒙古招生的计算机类、自动化类、电子信息类、电气类等专业均为近年高热推荐专业（2024年电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程及其自动化高热推荐），专业热度对报考有正向拉动；内蒙古2026年物理类考生估算约11.1万人，较2025年8.4万人增加约32.5%，考生规模大幅增长加剧整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7839名、2026年小幅扩招4.1%、内蒙古物理类考生大幅增加约32.5%以及该校985层次+高热度专业的吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在8031名基础上小幅后移至约8081名，区间7581–8581名。

- 通信工程。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were 10504→6116→10442→11329→7839, showing significant fluctuations overall, characterized by "big ups and downs" in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7839, notably moving forward compared to 2024 (intensified competition), reflecting a rebound in the popularity of this university among Inner Mongolia science candidates; the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Inner Mongolia was 100 in 2021, 98 from 2022 to 2025, and increased to 102 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 4.1%, which usually eases competition slightly but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking about 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a high level that strongly attracts high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition disputes, with no major negative public opinion; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 82nd (average), with moderate short video exposure, showing no abnormal signals of application attention; relying on the disciplinary strength of the main campus of Northeastern University, with Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, etc., which highly correspond to the automation, computer, mechanical, and materials majors recruited in Inner Mongolia, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors recruited by this university in Inner Mongolia, such as Computer, Automation, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering, are all highly recommended popular majors in recent years (Electronic Information/Communication highly recommended in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended), with major popularity positively driving applications; the estimated number of physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 111,000, an increase of about 32.5% from 84,000 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 7839 in 2025, a slight expansion of 4.1% in 2026, a significant increase of about 32.5% in physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia, and the attractiveness of the 985 level plus high-demand majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back from 8031 to about 8081, with a range of 7581–8581.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Communication Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Instrumentation (Intelligent Optoelectronic Perception)
- Intelligent Perception Engineering
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Mechatronic Engineering
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Materials (including Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Economics (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- E-commerce
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including English, Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 8081, range 7581–8581. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (7581) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Automation, Computer Science and Technology, etc.; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 8081) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors while sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (8581) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 1237 → 2184 → 2571 → 1140 respectively. In 2025, the ranking significantly moved forward compared to the previous two years, returning to around the 2022 level, indicating a recovery in application popularity. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia for liberal arts/history category was 2 students from 2022 to 2024, increased to 4 students in 2025, and then decreased back to 2 students in 2026, a 50% reduction, leading to significantly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 38th on the Soft Science main list. Its high level also attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with average popularity on Douyin and no significant negative public opinion affecting applications. Only the Ethnology major is offered for liberal arts, and Northeastern University has no discipline evaluation data for Ethnology. This major belongs to a niche humanities and social sciences direction, with relatively low application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 43,000, an increase of approximately 32.1% from 33,000 in 2025. The significant growth in candidate scale intensifies overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1140, a 50% enrollment reduction in 2026, and a significant increase of about 32.1% in history category candidates in Inner Mongolia, the enrollment reduction effect pushes the ranking forward, but the increase in candidates partially offsets this effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back from 798 to about 848, with a range of 720–976.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Only the Ethnology major (plan for 2 students) is offered for liberal arts, with very few enrollment spots, so ranking fluctuations may be large. The predicted ranking is about 848, with a range of 720–976. Candidates within this range have a relatively high probability of admission, but attention should be paid to the subject requirements: first choice history, then politics.
